LanguageData.ARA_WormholePortal_A.label: Arachne tunnel species
LanguageData.ARA_WormholePortal_A.description: A giant Arachne worm is the main component of the Arachne wormhole network. It can accept the instructions of the Zerg and extend its tail to a distant destination to form an underground passage. Objects and people entering the underground passage through the head will be pressurized and moved by the tunnel species to move quickly toward the tail. The wormhole allows two-way traffic.
LanguageData.ARA_WormholePortal_B.label: The tail exit of Arachne Tunnel
LanguageData.ARA_WormholePortal_B.description: The tail of the Arachne tunnel species is the exit of the underground passage formed by its long and narrow body. Objects and people entering the underground passage through the tail will be pressurized and moved by the tunnel species to move quickly toward the head. The wormhole allows two-way traffic.
